events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault: cotter pin omitted on castle nut in suspension/steering, in-service. This is non-compliant, safety critical because castle nut can back off, causing separation of steering/suspension components. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? In-service operating asset, omission of cotter pin on castle nut is critical because loss of steering/suspension control. But maybe high. Need decide. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Could also degraded? No, it's omitted, not degraded. Failed? The cotter pin is missing; the assembly is non-compliant. Use installed-defective and non-compliant. Percent complete: in-service asset, maybe 100% but defect found; overall progress 100. Value 0. Sound etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, numbers. Use empty string and 0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Findings: cotter pin missing from castle nut; castle nut not secured against loosening; non-conformance to OEM/alignment specs. Actions: install correct cotter pin per OEM torque and alignment spec; inspect all similar assemblies; quarantine vehicle/asset until repaired; verify castle nut torque. Rationale: cotter pin is a positive retention device; omission allows nut to loosen, risking separation of suspension/steering linkage. References: OEM assembly specs, alignment specs, maybe SAE/ISO but only OEM and alignment. Use those. Need ensure valid JSON.
